reason: This is a direct quote from the Quran (9:51) commonly used in general Islamic contexts for comfort and reliance on Allah. It contains no extremist rhetoric or ISIS-specific messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes

original_post: { قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلانَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ }
